prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为6546→5339→6066→5905→9627，2025年出现异常大幅后移（较2024年骤降3722名），打破了此前在5300–6600区间波动的 格局，2025年基准位次约9627名；2021–2025年该校在海南省综合类招生计划均为98人，2026年综合类73人加医学类16人合计89人，较2025年缩招约9 .2%，缩招通常使位次数字减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第74名，近年排名稳定在69–78区间，整体层次稳 固；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，男排夺冠等正面事件提升学校曝光度；抖音热度排名第43位（较热），短视频平台关注度较高，可能吸引更多考生报考。 2023年曾出现投档线相关偏负面舆情，但影响已淡化；食品科学与工程为A+学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工 程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 海南省2026年高考考生约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模大幅增加 ，竞争显著加剧，近年保持平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常后移、2026年计划缩招约9.2%与考生规 模大幅增长约15.7%的对冲效应，考生增加带来的竞争加剧影响大于缩招的宽松效应；加之声誉偏正面、抖音热度较高吸引更多关注，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准基础上略 有后移。预测最低位次约9297名，区间8797–9797名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were 6546 → 5339 → 6066 → 5905 → 9627 respectively. In 2025, there was an abnormal significant backward shift (a drop of 3722 places compared to 2024), breaking the previous fluctuation range of 5300–6600. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 9627. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for this university in Hainan Province for comprehensive subjects was 98 students each year. In 2026, the comprehensive category has 73 students plus 16 from the medical category, totaling 89 students, a reduction of about 9.2% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment usually makes the ranking number smaller (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 74th, with a stable range of 69–78 in recent years, indicating a solid overall level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is generally positive. Positive events such as the men's volleyball team winning the championship have increased the university's exposure. Its Douyin popularity ranks 43rd (relatively hot), with high attention on short video platforms, which may attract more candidates to apply. In 2023, there was some negative public opinion related to the admission cutoff line, but its impact has faded. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation) and is the only discipline rated A- or above at this university. It directly corresponds to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment plan, which has some appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of college entrance examination candidates in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 67,408 in 2025. The candidate scale has significantly increased, leading to intensified competition, which has remained stable in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the offsetting effects of the abnormal backward shift in rankings in 2025, the approximately 9.2% reduction in enrollment plan in 2026, and the significant increase of about 15.7% in candidate scale, the intensified competition due to the increase in candidates has a greater impact than the easing effect of enrollment reduction. Additionally, the generally positive reputation and high Douyin popularity attract more attention. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward based on the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9297, with a range of 8797–9797.

- Computer Science and Technology (National First-Class Undergraduate Program)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8797–9797, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction. Tier 1 majors can be used as sprint targets (popular majors such as Law, Computer Science, Clinical Medicine have historically had rankings significantly better than the school line), while Tier 3 majors serve as a safe backup choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8500), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 9700), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 南昌大学医学类在海南省近五年最低录取位次波动较大：2021年3766名（计划18人）、2022年9685名（计划20人）、2023年6633名（计划20人）、2024年5793名（计划21人）、2 025年10262名（计划19人）。2026年医学类招生计划为16人，较2025年的19人减少3人，缩招幅度约15.8%。计划缩减通常意味着竞争加剧，但2025年位次已处于历史高位（最易进 ），缩招将推动位次向更靠前的方向（更难进）回调。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学是国家211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科拥有完整的本-硕-博培养体系，临床医学等专业在区域内享有较高声誉，对海 南考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，临床医学、医学影像学等专业竞争尤为激烈。南昌大学位于江西省会南昌市，地理位置适中，对海南考生而言属于省外优质选择。2026年 医学类仅招16人，招生规模较小，进一步加剧了位次竞争的不确定性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年南昌大学医学类最低录取位次约为9490名，波动区间为9205至9775名。2026年缩招导致竞争加剧，位次较2025年有所回升（位 次数字减小，更难进），但考虑到2025年位次异常偏高，回升幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical programs in Hainan Province have fluctuated significantly over the past five years: 3766 in 2021 (plan 18), 9685 in 2022 (plan 20), 6633 in 2023 (plan 20), 5793 in 2024 (plan 21), and 10262 in 2025 (plan 19). The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 16, a decrease of 3 from 2025's 19, a reduction of approximately 15.8%. Plan reductions usually mean increased competition, but the 2025 ranking is already at a historical high (easiest to enter). The reduction will push the ranking back towards a more competitive (harder to enter) direction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key national university under the 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have a complete undergraduate-master-doctoral training system, and specialties such as clinical medicine enjoy a high reputation in the region, continuously attracting Hainan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs have always been popular choices in the college entrance examination, with specialties like clinical medicine and medical imaging being particularly competitive. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang, the capital of Jiangxi Province, with a moderate geographical location, making it a high-quality out-of-province choice for Hainan candidates. In 2026, only 16 students will be admitted to medical programs, a small enrollment scale that further increases the uncertainty of ranking competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in 2026 is approximately 9490, with a fluctuation range of 9205 to 9775. The enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifies competition, causing the ranking to rise compared to 2025 (smaller ranking number, harder to enter), but considering the abnormally high ranking in 2025, the increase is limited.
